title: noccaea tenuis
intro: Noccaea tenuis, also known as the small alpine wintergreen or small wintergreen, is a small perennial plant native to the alpine regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Noccaea tenuis include reducing pain and inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns.
